zh.lifeSummary: 當Almaric de Spencer於1150年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利時，他的父親Thurstan le Despenser28歲，母親Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire27歲。他於1169年之前與Amabel Maud de Cheyne在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年4月24日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Almaric de Spencer于1150年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利时，他的父亲Thurstan le Despenser28岁，母亲Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire27岁。他于1169年之前与Amabel Maud de Cheyne在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年4月24日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Almaric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic personal name composed of ala ‘all’ or ali ‘stranger’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. Now rare, it was introduced to Britain in this form by the Normans. The first element may also in part derive from a contracted form of adal ‘noble’. The Blessed Alaricus or Adalricus ( d. 975 ) was a Swabian prince who became a monk at the monastery of Einsiedeln in Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Almaric de Spencer was born in 1150, in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thurstan le Despenser, was 28 and his mother, Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, was 27. He married Amabel Maud de Cheyne before 1169, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 April 1204, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Almaric de Spencer est né en 1150, à King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thurstan le Despenser, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Amabel Maud de Cheyne avant 1169, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1204, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Almaric de Spencer 1150 in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurstan le Despenser 28 und seine Mutter Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire 27. Er hat vor 1169 in England Amabel Maud de Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. April 1204 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Almaric de Spencer è nato il nel 1150 nel King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thurstan le Despenser, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Amabel Maud de Cheyne prima del 1169, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1204, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Almaric de Spencerが1150年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアキング'ス スタンリーで生まれた時，父Thurstan le Despenserは28歳，母Lady Lucia de Oxfordshireは27歳であった。1169年以前にイギリスでAmabel Maud de Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年4月24日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Almaric de Spencer(이)가 1150년 영국 그루스스터실르 킨그'스 스탠리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurstan le Despenser(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1169년 이전 영국에서 Amabel Maud de Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 4월 24일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Almaric de Spencer nasceu em 1150, em King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thurstan le Despenser, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabel Maud de Cheyne antes 1169, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1204, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Almaric de Spencer родился в 1150 г. в местности кинг'с стэнли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thurstan le Despenser было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabel Maud de Cheyne перед 1169 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 апреля 1204 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Almaric de Spencer nació en 1150, en King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thurstan le Despenser, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Amabel Maud de Cheyne antes de 1169, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1204, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
